_description: Editorial subject queue for daily entries. The cron pulls the FIRST item before falling back to the auto-picker. Each item can be a plain string or an object with {subject, query?, notes?}. Add subjects to the queue when you want editorial control over upcoming entries; leave empty for the auto-picker to drive variety.

_format_examples.subject: Bagger 288
_format_examples.notes: Largest land vehicle on Earth — should rate 9.5+

queue.subject: Beluga, Airbus
queue.notes: Whale-shaped fuselage cargo plane. Used to ferry airplane parts BETWEEN airplane factories — the joke writes itself. Plenty of clean Unsplash photos. Christopher's editorial pick to follow Thiccc Boeing in the aircraft category.
